creator: ltning-freebsd@anduin.net
text:
(In reply to Florian Smeets from comment #6)
Thanks a lot for getting the patch in!

Can you think of a way to prevent this from happening again? It was quite unpleasant for us (took a bit to find out what was actually going on) and it's not the first time this precise issue has cropped up. I suspect it can only be verified by actually spinning up the nginx binary with an appropriate configuration, but could the nginx port pick up the correct version from the lua-* ports?
